summary: Iteration 24: Theme Toggle Testing for Admin and Super Admin interfaces. Found and fixed a critical bug in Super Admin Statistics page.

admin_theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) in Admin header works correctly. Switches between light (white bg) and dark (dark navy bg) modes. Toggle persists via useThemeStore.

super_admin_theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle button in Super Admin header works correctly. Light/dark modes switch properly with appropriate color changes.

admin_dashboard_light_mode.details: Admin dashboard renders with white backgrounds, proper text colors in light mode. Shows KPI cards, reservation stats, top vehicles.

admin_dashboard_dark_mode.details: After toggle, admin dashboard renders with dark backgrounds (#0B0F1A), light text colors.

admin_statistics_page.details: Statistics page renders correctly in both light and dark modes. Shows KPIs, daily revenue chart, weekly trends, vehicle utilization.

admin_reservations_page.details: Reservations page renders correctly with theme colors. Shows reservation list with filters.

super_admin_dashboard.details: Super Admin dashboard with global view loads correctly. Shows agencies statistics, GPS button.

super_admin_statistics_page.details: Page was broken with 'C is not defined' error. Fixed by passing colors (C) as prop to BarChart and DonutChart helper functions. Now displays correctly with theme toggle support.

agency_app_statistics_tab.details: Statistics tab visible in agency-app navigation, page loads correctly showing KPIs, charts, utilization bars.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: BarChart and DonutChart helper functions referenced 'C' (theme colors) but C was defined inside the SuperAdminStatistics component scope, not accessible to these module-level functions
bugs_found_and_fixed.error_message: Uncaught Error: C is not defined (line 39)
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix_applied: Added 'C' as a prop to BarChart and DonutChart functions, and updated all usages to pass C prop when calling these components

context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle functionality verified working across all admin interfaces. The useThemeStore is shared across agency-app, admin, and super-admin. Light mode is default. Dark mode uses #0B0F1A background with light text. The testID attributes are 'admin-theme-toggle' (admin) and 'sa-theme-toggle' (super-admin). Metro cache was cleared during testing - may need to be cleared again if CSS issues arise.
